name: pitchr-mvp
description: Pitchr — AI proposal generator for Nigerian freelancers

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.build: cd backend && npm run build && cd ../frontend && npm run build
scripts.typecheck: cd backend && npx tsc --noEmit && cd ../frontend && npx tsc --noEmit
